page_title: Evangelion New Theatrical Edition: EVANGELION ASSAULT ACTION Q
text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released on 03 September 2013. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2013/828859.html The line was based on the Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo film. There are 4 figures in the line.

Toys

{| class="wikitable"
! Figure
! Name
! Series
! Price (Yen)
! Release Date
! Notes
|-
|-
|
|Evangelion Production Model-02'γ
|Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo
|¥480 (Tax Excluded)
|03 September 2013
|Includes a collapsable double naginata and two alternate hands.
|-
|
|Evangelion Production Model Custom Type-08β
|Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo
|¥480 (Tax Excluded)
|03 September 2013
|Includes a pistol, an ultra-long-range rifle, a plastic base and two alternate hands.
|-
|
|Evangelion 13 (2 arms)
|Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo
|¥480 (Tax Excluded)
|03 September 2013
|Includes Spear of Longinus, a plastic base and two alternate hands.
|-
|
|Evangelion 13 (4 arms)
|Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo
|¥480 (Tax Excluded)
|03 September 2013
|Includes Spear of Longinus and four alternate hands.
|}
